canonical_question: How do I design an analytics and metrics pipeline?
constraints: Never ingest raw unbounded-cardinality labels (user IDs, session IDs) into a metrics store
Always deploy a dead-letter queue (DLQ) for failed events
Kafka topic partition count cannot be decreased after creation
ClickHouse ReplacingMergeTree deduplication is eventual, not immediate
Stream processing state must be persisted to durable storage

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Simple dashboard <100 req/s with no real-time requirement
skip_this_unit_if.use_instead: Use managed Datadog, New Relic, or Grafana Cloud

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need APM tracing, not metrics aggregation

inputs_needed.question: What is your expected event ingestion rate?
What query latency do you need for dashboards and alerts?
What kind of processing do you need on the event stream?

related_to.label: Docker Compose to Kubernetes (deploying pipeline infrastructure)

solves.label: PostgreSQL Slow Queries (offload analytics to OLAP store)
